variables.label: Postgres User
variables.description: The username for the Postgres database.

variables.label: Postgres Password
variables.description: The password for the Postgres user.

variables.label: Postgres Database Name
variables.description: The name of the Postgres database to back up.

variables.label: Backup Schedule
variables.description: Cron expression for the backup schedule.

variables.label: S3 Access Key ID
variables.description: Your AWS S3 Access Key ID.

variables.label: S3 Secret Access Key
variables.description: Your AWS S3 Secret Access Key.

variables.label: S3 Bucket
variables.description: The name of the S3 bucket where backups will be stored.

variables.label: S3 Prefix
variables.description: The prefix for the backup files in the S3 bucket.

variables.label: Postgres Extra Options
variables.description: Extra options for the pg_dump command.

instructions.start: Postgres Backup to S3 allows you to automatically back up your Postgres database to an S3 bucket. Configure the environment variables as needed.
instructions.end: The backup service is now configured and will start automatically according to the defined schedule.

description: Automatically backs up your Postgres database to an S3 bucket on a scheduled basis.
